mapper.select: SELECT id, message_id, interface_id, direction, source_system, target_system, status, request_body, response_body, error_message, retry_count, processing_ms, kafka_partition, kafka_offset, created_at, processed_at FROM eai_message_history WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, message_id, interface_id, direction, source_system, target_system, status, request_body, response_body, error_message, retry_count, processing_ms, kafka_partition, kafka_offset, created_at, processed_at FROM eai_message_history WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO eai_message_history (message_id, interface_id, direction, source_system, target_system, status, request_body, response_body, error_message, retry_count, processing_ms, kafka_partition, kafka_offset, processed_at) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{interfaceId}, #{direction}, #{sourceSystem}, #{targetSystem}, #{status}, #{messageBody}, #{responseBody}, #{errorMessage}, #{retryCount}, #{processingMs}, #{kafkaPartition}, #{kafkaOffset}, #{processedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE eai_message_history SET status = #{status}, processed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
